name: Idle + Walk
prompt: A 4x4 sprite sheet of a character in fighting idle stance with fists raised, then walking forward with left foot stepping out, extending into full stride, shifting weight to right foot, and completing the step cycle, then walking backward through the same phases in reverse.

animations.name: Idle
animations.description: Fighting idle stance, fists raised, subtle body sway

segments.description: Left foot stepping forward, right foot planted
Left leg extended forward in full stride
Weight shifting forward, right foot lifting off ground
Right foot coming forward, completing step cycle
Right foot stepping backward, left foot planted
Right leg extended back in full stride
Weight shifting backward, left foot lifting
Left foot stepping back, completing step cycle
